mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly reduce the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, mechanically lifting equity valuations and generating positive forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained acceleration in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and impending recession, triggering risk-off positioning that suppresses S&P 500 returns over the subsequent quarter.
failure_condition: Forward 60-day returns remain positive in >65% of instances where the unemployment threshold is breached.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent declines in new home sales and housing starts indicate a synchronized collapse in residential demand, which reduces construction-related corporate revenues and drags down broad equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict negative returns when both series decline simultaneously, with a hit rate below 45% over out-of-sample periods.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production reflects robust manufacturing output and supply-side resilience, generating short-term positive momentum in equity markets as investors price in improved corporate earnings trajectories.
failure_condition: The signal loses predictive power during liquidity crunches, with 5-day forward returns turning negative in >70% of high-INDPRO months.

mechanism_narrative: Rapid acceleration in consumer price inflation erodes real corporate margins and forces anticipatory monetary tightening, leading to sustained negative equity returns over the following quarter.
failure_condition: Positive 60-day returns exceed 55% of the time when inflation accelerates past the threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in total nonfarm payrolls and a declining unemployment rate confirms broad-based labor market strength, supporting consumer spending forecasts and driving positive equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The combined labor signal yields a positive return hit rate below 50% across multiple expansionary periods.

mechanism_narrative: Quarter-over-quarter growth in real GDP reflects sustained aggregate demand, which mechanically supports corporate revenue growth and generates positive short-term equity momentum.
failure_condition: The GDP growth signal fails to predict positive 5-day returns, with a rank correlation below 0.01 over rolling 5-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Consecutive monthly declines in industrial production signal a manufacturing contraction that precedes broader economic slowdown, triggering risk aversion and negative equity returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Forward 20-day returns are positive in >60% of instances following two consecutive months of industrial production declines.
